```{r}
setwd("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/functional_enrichment")

mf <- gseGO(geneList     = res.list,
            OrgDb        = org.Mm.eg.db,
            ont          = "MF",
            keyType = "ENTREZID",
            pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
            verbose      = FALSE)
mf.simple <- clusterProfiler::simplify(mf)

write.csv(mf.simple@result, "scramble_vs_background_go_mf.csv")

pdf("scramble_vs_background_go_mf.pdf",
    width = 6,
    height = 5)
dotplot(mf.simple, 
        showCategory=10, 
        title = paste("GSE GO MF", "Scramble vs Background", sep = " "), 
        split=".sign",
        x = "NES", 
        font.size = 10,
        label_format = 50) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype="dotted", color = "#444444", size=1) +
        scale_color_viridis(option = "viridis", direction = 1) +
        labs(fill = "test")
dev.off()
```

### Cellular component
```{r}
setwd("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/functional_enrichment")

cc <- gseGO(geneList     = res.list,
            OrgDb        = org.Mm.eg.db,
            ont          = "CC",
            keyType = "ENTREZID",
            pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
            verbose      = FALSE)
cc.simple <- clusterProfiler::simplify(cc)

write.csv(cc.simple@result, "scramble_vs_background_go_cc.csv")

pdf("scramble_vs_background_go_cc.pdf",
    width = 6,
    height = 5)
dotplot(cc.simple, 
        showCategory=10, 
        title = paste("GSE GO CC", "Scramble vs Background", sep = " "), 
        split=".sign",
        x = "NES", 
        font.size = 10,
        label_format = 50) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype="dotted", color = "#444444", size=1) +
        scale_color_viridis(option = "viridis", direction = 1) +
        labs(fill = "test")
dev.off()
```

## Arc vs no infect + scramble (PP7)
```{r}
setwd("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/functional_enrichment")

# get score to use in enrichment
arc_vs_no_infect_scramble$score <- sign(arc_vs_no_infect_scramble$log2FoldChange) * -log10(arc_vs_no_infect_scramble$pvalue)
res.sorted <- arc_vs_no_infect_scramble[order(arc_vs_no_infect_scramble$score, decreasing = TRUE),]
res.list <- res.sorted$score
names(res.list) <- res.sorted$entrezgene_id
res.list <- res.list[!is.na(names(res.list))] # remove genes witn no ID
res.list <- res.list[!is.na(res.list)] # remove genes with no score
```

### Biological process
```{r}
setwd("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/functional_enrichment")

bp <- gseGO(geneList     = res.list,
            OrgDb        = org.Mm.eg.db,
            ont          = "BP",
            keyType = "ENTREZID",
            pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
            verbose      = FALSE)
bp.simple <- clusterProfiler::simplify(bp)

write.csv(bp.simple@result, "arc_vs_no_infect_scramble_go_bp.csv")

pdf("arc_vs_no_infect_scramble_go_bp.pdf",
    width = 6,
    height = 5)
dotplot(bp.simple, 
        showCategory=10, 
        title = paste("GSE GO BP", "Arc vs No infect + Scramble", sep = " "), 
        split=".sign",
        x = "NES", 
        font.size = 10,
        label_format = 50) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype="dotted", color = "#444444", size=1) +
        scale_color_viridis(option = "viridis", direction = 1) +
        labs(fill = "test")
dev.off()
```

### Moelcular function
```{r}
setwd("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/functional_enrichment")

mf <- gseGO(geneList     = res.list,
            OrgDb        = org.Mm.eg.db,
            ont          = "MF",
            keyType = "ENTREZID",
            pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
            verbose      = FALSE)
mf.simple <- clusterProfiler::simplify(mf)

write.csv(mf.simple@result, "arc_vs_no_infect_scramble_go_mf.csv")

pdf("arc_vs_no_infect_scramble_go_mf.pdf",
    width = 6,
    height = 5)
dotplot(mf.simple,
        showCategory=10,
        title = paste("GSE GO MF", "Arc vs No infect + Scramble", sep = " "),
        split=".sign",
        x = "NES",
        font.size = 10,
        label_format = 50) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype="dotted", color = "#444444", size=1) +
        scale_color_viridis(option = "viridis", direction = 1) +
        labs(fill = "test")
dev.off()
```

### Cellular component
```{r}
setwd("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/functional_enrichment")

cc <- gseGO(geneList     = res.list,
            OrgDb        = org.Mm.eg.db,
            ont          = "CC",
            keyType = "ENTREZID",
            pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
            verbose      = FALSE)
cc.simple <- clusterProfiler::simplify(cc)

write.csv(cc.simple@result, "arc_vs_no_infect_scramble_go_cc.csv")

pdf("arc_vs_no_infect_scramble_go_cc.pdf",
    width = 6,
    height = 5)
dotplot(cc.simple, 
        showCategory=10, 
        title = paste("GSE GO CC", "Arc vs No infect + Scramble", sep = " "), 
        split=".sign",
        x = "NES", 
        font.size = 10,
        label_format = 50) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype="dotted", color = "#444444", size=1) +
        scale_color_viridis(option = "viridis", direction = 1) +
        labs(fill = "test")
dev.off()
```

# Over representation enrichment analysis

## No infect vs Background

### Upregulated
```{r}
dir.create("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/over_representation_enrichment")
setwd("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/over_representation_enrichment")

enrich_up <- enrichGO(gene = subset(noinfect_vs_background, noinfect_vs_background$pvalue < 0.05 & noinfect_vs_background$log2FoldChange > 0)$entrezgene_id,
            universe = as.character(noinfect_vs_background$entrezgene_id),
            OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db,
            ont = "ALL",
            pool = TRUE,
            keyType = "ENTREZID",
            pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
            readable = TRUE)

enrich_up.simple <- clusterProfiler::simplify(enrich_up)

write.csv(enrich_up.simple@result, "noinfect_vs_background_enrich_up.csv")

pdf("noinfect_vs_background_enrich_up.pdf",
    width = 10,
    height = 5)
dotplot(enrich_up.simple, 
        showCategory=10, 
        title = paste("GSE GO", "No infect vs Background", "Upregulated", sep = " "), 
        font.size = 10,
        label_format = 50,
        split = "ONTOLOGY") +
  facet_wrap(~ONTOLOGY)
dev.off()
```

### Downregulated
```{r}
setwd("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/over_representation_enrichment")

enrich_down <- enrichGO(gene = subset(noinfect_vs_background, noinfect_vs_background$pvalue < 0.05 & noinfect_vs_background$log2FoldChange < 0)$entrezgene_id,
            universe = as.character(noinfect_vs_background$entrezgene_id),
            OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db,
            ont = "ALL",
            pool = TRUE,
            keyType = "ENTREZID",
            pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
            readable = TRUE)

enrich_down.simple <- clusterProfiler::simplify(enrich_down)

write.csv(enrich_down.simple@result, "noinfect_vs_background_enrich_down.csv")

pdf("noinfect_vs_background_enrich_down.pdf",
    width = 10,
    height = 5)
dotplot(enrich_down.simple, 
        showCategory=10, 
        title = paste("GSE GO", "No infect vs Background", "Downregulated", sep = " "), 
        font.size = 10,
        label_format = 50,
        split = "ONTOLOGY") +
  facet_wrap(~ONTOLOGY)
dev.off()
```

## Scramble vs Background

### Upregulated
```{r}
dir.create("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/over_representation_enrichment")
setwd("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/over_representation_enrichment")

enrich_up <- enrichGO(gene = subset(scramble_vs_background, scramble_vs_background$pvalue < 0.05 & scramble_vs_background$log2FoldChange > 0)$entrezgene_id,
            universe = as.character(scramble_vs_background$entrezgene_id),
            OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db,
            ont = "ALL",
            pool = TRUE,
            keyType = "ENTREZID",
            pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
            readable = TRUE)

enrich_up.simple <- clusterProfiler::simplify(enrich_up)

write.csv(enrich_up.simple@result, "scramble_vs_background_enrich_up.csv")

pdf("scramble_vs_background_enrich_up.pdf",
    width = 10,
    height = 5)
dotplot(enrich_up.simple, 
        showCategory=10, 
        title = paste("GSE GO", "Scramble vs Background", "Upregulated", sep = " "), 
        font.size = 10,
        label_format = 50,
        split = "ONTOLOGY") +
  facet_wrap(~ONTOLOGY)
dev.off()
```

### Downregulated
```{r}
setwd("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/over_representation_enrichment")

enrich_down <- enrichGO(gene = subset(scramble_vs_background, scramble_vs_background$pvalue < 0.05 & scramble_vs_background$log2FoldChange < 0)$entrezgene_id,
            universe = as.character(scramble_vs_background$entrezgene_id),
            OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db,
            ont = "ALL",
            pool = TRUE,
            keyType = "ENTREZID",
            pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
            readable = TRUE)

enrich_down.simple <- clusterProfiler::simplify(enrich_down)

write.csv(enrich_down.simple@result, "scramble_vs_background_enrich_down.csv")

pdf("scramble_vs_background_enrich_down.pdf",
    width = 10,
    height = 5)
dotplot(enrich_down.simple, 
        showCategory=10, 
        title = paste("GSE GO", "Scramble vs Background", "Downregulated", sep = " "), 
        font.size = 10,
        label_format = 50,
        split = "ONTOLOGY") +
  facet_wrap(~ONTOLOGY)
dev.off()
```

## Arc vs no infect + scramble (PP7)
```{r}
dir.create("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/over_representation_enrichment")
setwd("~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/over_representation_enrichment")

enrich_up <- enrichGO(gene = subset(arc_vs_no_infect_scramble, arc_vs_no_infect_scramble$pvalue < 0.05 & arc_vs_no_infect_scramble$log2FoldChange > 0)$entrezgene_id,
            universe = as.character(arc_vs_no_infect_scramble$entrezgene_id),
            OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db,
            ont = "ALL",
            pool = TRUE,
            keyType = "ENTREZID",
            pvalueCutoff = 0.1,
            readable = TRUE)

enrich_up.simple <- clusterProfiler::simplify(enrich_up)

write.csv(enrich_up.simple@result, "arc_vs_no_infect_scramble_enrich_up.csv")

pdf("arc_vs_no_infect_scramble_enrich_up.pdf",
    width = 10,
    height = 7)
dotplot(enrich_up.simple, 
        showCategory=10, 
        title = "GO: Arc vs Control", 
        font.size = 10,
        label_format = 60,
        split = "ONTOLOGY") +
  facet_wrap(~ONTOLOGY)
dev.off()
```
